title: Collecting and Reading Mork Borg Supplements
body:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=KtjAJuKUbDM

Daniel (@dungeondive) explores seven recent Mork Borg supplements including Icon (official sealed gods), Suffering Extended (expanded character creation), Solitary Depths (solo play enhancement), Bork Morgue zine (fan-created supplement), Crawling Death (dungeon generator), Fish Borg (dedicated fishing system), and the Masticator Gate with Endless Demon Deck (large campaign). He emphasizes that collecting and reading Mork Borg material is as valid a hobby as playing the game, sharing how different supplements expand character creation, solo mechanics, and encounter variety.

----

Which Mork Borg supplement has had the biggest impact on how you play or prepare your sessions, and why?
